title: delphinium gypsophilum subsp. gypsophilum
intro: Delphinium gypsophilum subsp. gypsophilum, also known as the Gypsophila Delphinium or Russian Delphinium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Delphinium gypsophilum subsp. gypsophilum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for various ailments.
